message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontName Arial
skinparam classFontSize 14
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #333333
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E8E8E8
skinparam classHeaderFontColor #333333
skinparam classHeaderFontSize 16
skinparam classHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam classAttributeFontColor #333333
skinparam classMethodFontColor #333333
skinparam classAttributeIconColor #4CAF50
skinparam classMethodIconColor #4CAF50
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 8
skinparam classMethodIconSize 8
skinparam classAttributeIconPosition left
skinparam classMethodIconPosition left
skinparam classAttributeIconStyle filled
skinparam classMethodIconStyle filled
skinparam classAttributeIconShape circle
skinparam classMethodIconShape circle
skinparam classAttributeIconColor #4CAF50
skinparam classMethodIconColor #4CAF50
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 8
skinparam classMethodIconSize 8
skinparam classAttributeIconPosition left
skinparam classMethodIconPosition left
skinparam classAttributeIconStyle filled
skinparam classMethodIconStyle filled
skinparam classAttributeIconShape circle
skinparam classMethodIconShape circle

class App {
    + main()
    + start()
}

class FileHandler {
    + promptFile(): String
    + writeListToFile(): void
    + readListFromFile(): ArrayList<String>
}

class item {
    + LocalDate dueDate
    + String desc
    + getDesc()
    + getDate()
    + setDesc()
    + setDate()
}

class HomeScreenController {
    + ObservableList<OL> Lists
    + viewListsClicked()
    + listClicked(nameOfList, mode)
    + addBlankListClicked()
    + addExistingListClicked()
    + editListClicked()
    + saveAllListsClicked()
    + confirmDeleteClicked()
}

class ListScreenController {
    + ObservableList currentList
    + filterBoxChanged()
    + saveToStorage()
    + addNewItemClicked()
    + deleteSelectedClicked()
    + completeBoxChanged(item)
    + itemDescChanged(item)
    + itemDueDateChanged(item)
    + itemSelected(item)
}

App --> HomeScreenController
App --> ListScreenController
FileHandler --o HomeScreenController
FileHandler --o ListScreenController
item --o HomeScreenController
item --o ListScreenController

@enduml
